Appearances:
Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by Charles Byrd.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Nancy McCormick-Kovacich, Dennis McCormick-Kovacich, Jesse McCormick-Kovacich and Kevin McCormick-Kovacich are present.
Attorney Misti Schmidt representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JUN-11-2012 remains on calendar.
